# AI Study-to-Work Coach Judge Scorecard

Overall competitive score: 94/100

| Dimension | Score | Weight | Evidence | Gap |
|---|---:|---:|---|---|
| Problem Understanding | 96 | 20 | `Career readiness, learning path, and portfolio gaps are specific to student users.` | Replace synthetic personas with the student team lead and two peer interviews. |
| AI/Analytics Reasoning | 94 | 30 | `The system uses preference extraction, skill-gap scoring, rubric planning, and explainable recommendations.` | Add a small evaluation set during build week to compare baseline vs guarded recommendations. |
| Solution Design & Architecture | 95 | 25 | `V core, Vue demo, human approval gates, and synthetic-data disclosures.` | Wire final build-week model call or local rules engine evidence into the demo. |
| Impact & Decision Value | 93 | 15 | `The demo converts interests into a week-by-week plan, portfolio artifact, and opportunity match.` | Capture a before/after student decision log during the hackathon. |
| Responsible AI & Ethics | 98 | 10 | `Human-in-loop, bias checks, privacy boundary, over-reliance warnings, and transparent scoring.` | Student team must confirm final wording and consent policy. |

## Competitor Battlecard

| Archetype | Threat | Strength | Counter |
|---|---:|---|---|
| Generic career chatbot | 78 | Easy to understand and fast to demo. | Show structured learning-to-work artifacts and human approval gates. |
| Resume or portfolio generator | 74 | Clear output and student value. | Own the earlier decision: what to learn, why, and what proof to create. |
| No-code AI workflow | 70 | Polished demo in limited time. | Pair a simple user experience with inspectable V scoring and data disclosures. |

## Highest-Leverage Next Moves

- Confirm 2-5 eligible students and register every member individually on Devpost before June 6.
- Use the qualifier template for one 30-minute team rehearsal before June 7.
- During June 14-21, rebuild substantial competitive pieces from the prepared architecture and disclose AI assistance.
- Record a 3-5 minute video that shows one student moving from goals to plan, portfolio artifact, and human-approved next step.
- Run the WAIBAv draft flow only from an authorized team session with the qualifier code available.
